title: Daily Reversal Signal From Large Volume Spikes In Energy Sector Etf Xlv After Macro Input Pressure Spike
thesis: Sudden volume surges combined with a macro input pressure spike (e.g., oil price jump) often trigger short-term reversals as traders quickly adjust positions. Energy sector stocks react sharply to input price shocks, causing volatility and reversals.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLE
signal_logic: Enter short if XLE daily volume spikes 50% above 20-day average alongside a greater than 5% rise in crude oil futures price
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short if XLE daily volume spikes 50% above 20-day average alongside a greater than 5% rise in crude oil futures price Exit: Exit after 3 trading days or upon 2% price bounce
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLE via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily volatility and volume surges in energy are common with frequent oil price shocks.

schema.idea: Daily Reversal Signal From Large Volume Spikes In Energy Sector ETF XLV After Macro Input Pressure Spike

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices and volume for XLE

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector stocks react sharply to input price shocks, causing volatility and reversals.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short if XLE daily volume spikes 50% above 20-day average alongside a greater than 5% rise in crude oil futures price
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 trading days or upon 2% price bounce

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily volatility and volume surges in energy are common with frequent oil price shocks.

title: Weekly Google Trends Surge For Warehouse Worker Strike Signals Freight Logistics Disruption
thesis: A spike in strike-related searches implies potential supply chain or freight disruptions, often pressuring industrial stocks but benefiting alternative logistics firms. Industrial sector faces pressure from labor disruptions affecting supply chains and freight operations.
signal_logic: Enter short if weekly 'warehouse worker strike' search interest increases by more than 30% week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short if weekly 'warehouse worker strike' search interest increases by more than 30% week-over-week Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or once interest normalizes below 15% increase
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor disputes in logistics appear repeatedly with seasonal or contractual cycles.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or once interest normalizes below 15% increase
